title: VAN A PA AW Kong Pah Tawi Uh Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (Van a Pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi)2
Hong it ung, hong bia ung, Na mai ah hong kun ung,
Van a Pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (Pasian Ta aw na min hong liansak ung)2
Mawhna pan nong sawp a, Kha siangtho nong guanhi,
Pasian Ta aw na min hong lian sak ung.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: (Kha Siangtho lamdang hehnem pa na hi)2
Ka lampi nong hilh a, Ka sungah nong teng hi,
Kha siangtho lamdang hehnem pa na hi.
